'''dolashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiocervical|labiocervical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiocervical|labiocervical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dolashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dolashithi|dolashithi]] || [[word:dolashiji|dolashiji]] || [[word:dolashishi|dolashishi]] || [[word:dolashiki|dolashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dolashuthuthu|dolashuthuthu]] || [[word:dolashujuju|dolashujuju]] || [[word:dolashushushu|dolashushushu]] || [[word:dolashukuku|dolashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dolashuthu|dolashuthu]] || [[word:dolashuju|dolashuju]] || [[word:dolashushu|dolashushu]] || [[word:dolashuku|dolashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dolashufthuf|dolashufthuf]] || [[word:dolashufjuf|dolashufjuf]] || [[word:dolashufshuf|dolashufshuf]] || [[word:dolashufkuf|dolashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dolashethe|dolashethe]] || [[word:dolasheje|dolasheje]] || [[word:dolasheshe|dolasheshe]] || [[word:dolasheke|dolasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dolashothotho|dolashothotho]] || [[word:dolashojojo|dolashojojo]] || [[word:dolashoshosho|dolashoshosho]] || [[word:dolashokoko|dolashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dolashotho|dolashotho]] || [[word:dolashojo|dolashojo]] || [[word:dolashosho|dolashosho]] || [[word:dolashoko|dolashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dolashofthof|dolashofthof]] || [[word:dolashofjof|dolashofjof]] || [[word:dolashofshof|dolashofshof]] || [[word:dolashofkof|dolashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dolashïfthïf|dolashïfthïf]] || [[word:dolashïfjïf|dolashïfjïf]] || [[word:dolashïfshïf|dolashïfshïf]] || [[word:dolashïfkïf|dolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dolashïfthïfthïf|dolashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dolashïfjïfjïf|dolashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dolashïfshïfshïf|dolashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dolashïfkïfkïf|dolashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dolashïfthïf|dolashïfthïf]] || [[word:dolashïfjïf|dolashïfjïf]] || [[word:dolashïfshïf|dolashïfshïf]] || [[word:dolashïfkïf|dolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dolashïfthïf|dolashïfthïf]] || [[word:dolashïfjïf|dolashïfjïf]] || [[word:dolashïfshïf|dolashïfshïf]] || [[word:dolashïfkïf|dolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dolashæthæ|dolashæthæ]] || [[word:dolashæjæ|dolashæjæ]] || [[word:dolashæshæ|dolashæshæ]] || [[word:dolashækæ|dolashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dolashathatha|dolashathatha]] || [[word:dolashajaja|dolashajaja]] || [[word:dolashashasha|dolashashasha]] || [[word:dolashakaka|dolashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dolashatha|dolashatha]] || [[word:dolashaja|dolashaja]] || [[word:dolashasha|dolashasha]] || [[word:dolashaka|dolashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dolashafthaf|dolashafthaf]] || [[word:dolashafjaf|dolashafjaf]] || [[word:dolashafshaf|dolashafshaf]] || [[word:dolashafkaf|dolashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dolashasha|dolashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dolashësha|dolashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dolashrosha|dolashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dolashmusha|dolashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dolashyasha|dolashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godolashnkshësha|godolashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godolashnkrosha|godolashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godolashnkmusha|godolashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godolashnkyasha|godolashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dolalashasha|dolalashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dolalashësha|dolalashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dolalashrosha|dolalashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dolalashmusha|dolalashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dolalashyasha|dolalashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godolalashnkshësha|godolalashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godolalashnkrosha|godolalashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godolalashnkmusha|godolalashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godolalashnkyasha|godolalashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:delæshasha|delæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:delæshësha|delæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:delæshrosha|delæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:delæshmusha|delæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:delæshyasha|delæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godelæshnkshësha|godelæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godelæshnkrosha|godelæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godelæshnkmusha|godelæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godelæshnkyasha|godelæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dolfashasha|dolfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dolfashësha|dolfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dolfashrosha|dolfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dolfashmusha|dolfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dolfashyasha|dolfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godolfashnkshësha|godolfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godolfashnkrosha|godolfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godolfashnkmusha|godolfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godolfashnkyasha|godolfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
